brief_justification: Arrives at exactly n=33.33→33 via correct calculus derivation with symmetry imposition; traces first-order effects (individual optimization) through second-order (welfare loss vs social optimum, tragedy of commons framing); notes suppression signals and meta-comments on their structural limits mid-analysis; applies explicit falsification test computing total cattle, per-cow revenue, and earnings vs social optimum from a different angle; presents math clearly but no explicit confidence levels or structured uncertainty about rounding or continuous-vs-discrete assumption; does not evaluate alternative solution methods despite question suggesting algebraic approach as option; every derivation step shown with full substitution — a third party can reproduce without external context; avoids resource-infinity assumption (constraint embedded in revenue function) but does not name or address the negative gate explicitly; avoids both suppressed failure modes (resource_infinity_assumption absent, local_optimization_bias flagged rather than enacted) without explicit callout; topology prescribes elaborate branching FORK/JOIN/M-node/FREEFORM structure for mechanism design, but agent executes a linear derivation-verify chain with no branching visible.
